diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,166 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+
+- Public surface: Hono class export, Context export, type exports (Env, Handler, etc.)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono class, type re-exports from ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client types
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point for the Hono web framework, re-exports core classes and types
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports {Hono, Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions}
+
+## src/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: Env, Schema, Input, Handler, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, HandlerInterface, RouterRoute
+- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, BlankRecord, ToSchema, MergeTypedResponse, TypedResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Contains all core type definitions for Hono, including Env, Input, Handler signatures, RouterRoute, and utility types
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports Env, BlankEnv, Bindings, Variables, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, ToSchema, MergeTypedResponse, TypedResponse, HandlerResponse, H, Context, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, AnyGivenSchema, GivenSchema, Pick, Omit, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, BlankRecord, RemoveBlankRecord
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Hono class extending HonoBase with default router setup (SmartRouter)
+- Copy-safe detail: class Hono<E extends Env = BlankEnv, S extends Schema = BlankSchema, BasePath extends string = '/'> extends HonoBase<E, S, BasePath>, uses SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Public surface: HonoBase class, get, post, put, delete, patch, on, onError, notFound, route, use methods
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase class, errorHandler, blank, router, req, #handle, mountRoutes, buildRoutePath, getPath, matchRoute, compose, #handleNotFound, #handleError, #fetch, #dispatch, fetch, handle, RequestHandler, NotFoundHandler, HonoOptions, Router, RouterRoute, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter, Path, PathSegment, MergePath, PathPart, PathPattern
+- Imports or neighbors: ./types, ./error-handle
+- Plain-English summary: Core HonoBase implementation with routing middleware handling and execution flow
+- Copy-safe detail: class HonoBase has errorHandler default handler, mountRoutes appends route info, buildRoutePath handles path parameters, getPath returns current path, matchRoute matches against pattern, compose uses koa-compose pattern, #handleNotFound returns 404 response, #handleError calls custom handler or returns 500, #fetch is main request handler, fetch is the public request method
+
+## src/context.ts
+
+- Public surface: Context class, new() constructor, text, json, html, redirect, stream, getVariable, set, delete, var, get, set, get, getHeader, getBody, getRaw, get, set, get, get, get, get, set, get
+- Internal names noticed: ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, passThroughOnException, error, finalized
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ./utils/body, ./http-exception
+- Plain-English summary: Request context object holding variables, request, response, and execution state
+- Copy-safe detail: class Context has req, res, error, finalized, renderer, waitUntil, passThroughOnException, method, url, headers, set adds variable, get gets variable, delete deletes variable, var alias for get, getHeader gets header, getBody returns body object, getRaw returns raw request, get returns response, setHeader sets header, status gets/sets status, set sets header, statusText gets/sets status text, newResponse creates new response, redirect returns redirect response, stream returns stream response, getQuery gets query param
+
+## src/request.ts
+
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, getQuery, getHeader, getBody, raw, parseBody, parseForm, setBody, method, url, headers, request
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, GET_MATCH_RESULT, body data parsing, Request interface from global
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/body, ./constants
+- Plain-English summary: Request class implementing global Request interface with Hono-specific helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: class HonoRequest implements Request, has url, method, headers, request (raw), has getQuery, getHeader, getBody, raw returns raw request, parseBody returns body data, parseForm returns parsed form, setBody sets body, has custom GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT (Symbol)
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Exported unique symbol for match result identification
+- Copy-safe detail: export const GET_MATCH_RESULT: unique symbol = Symbol()
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+
+- Public surface: parseBody, parseFormData
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utilities for multipart form data and JSON
+- Copy-safe detail: type BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, parseBody parses request body, handleFile handles file data, handleDot handles dot notation, handleAll handles array fields, parseFormData parses FormData, serializeForm builds form data
+
+## src/compose.ts
+
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, index, context, next, isError, handler, finalized, onError, onNotFound
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types (Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler)
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition based on koa-compose pattern
+- Copy-safe detail: const compose, creates middleware dispatch loop, throw Error if next called multiple times, dispatch advances middleware index, handles error via onError, handles not-found via onNotFound, sets context.res on successful response
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class for throwing errors with status codes and responses
+- Copy-safe detail: class HTTPException extends Error with res and status fields, constructor takes status and options, getResponse returns Response with status and body or message
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/utils, ./client/client
+- Plain-English summary: Client module entry point exporting http client utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: export {hc}, export {parseResponse, DetailedError}, exports client request/response types
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+
+- Public surface: hc, Client class, ClientRequestImpl
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, Callback, Path, PathPattern, BuildSearchParamsFn, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, resolvePath, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, serialize
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-Engineered summary: HTTP client for Hono requests using proxy-based interface and fetch
+- Copy-safe detail: const hc, class ClientRequestImpl private url method, createProxy builds nested proxy for route navigation, hc returns Client instance, method path method path merge path with base
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: Client type, Fetch type, ClientRequestOptions type, ClientResponse type, InferResponseType, InferRequestType
+- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, FetchResult, FetchResultType, ObjectType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./types, ../utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Client module type definitions for request/response types
+- Copy-safe detail: type Fetch, type Client, type ClientRequest, type ClientResponse, type ClientRequestOptions, type BuildSearchParamsFn, type Callback, type ObjectType, type FetchResult, type FetchResultType, type DetailedError, type ContentfulStatusCode, type ClientErrorStatusCode, type ServerErrorStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse type alias, PickResponseByStatusCode type helper
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: isObject, ObjectType, DetailedError, ContentfulStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for path manipulation and deep merging
+- Copy-safe detail: mergePath concatenates paths, replaceUrlParam substitutes path params, buildSearchParams builds search params, replaceUrlProtocol changes ws/http, removeIndexString removes /index strings, deepMerge merges object deeply, isObject checks object type
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, DetailedError class, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: ./types (DetailedError)
+- Plain-English summary: Minimalized fetch wrapper with smart response parsing and detailed errors
+- Copy-safe detail: async function fetchRP accepts fetch Response, throws DetailedError on non-ok status, detectResponseType checks contentType header, returns json or text, DetailedError extends Error with detail code log and statusCode
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+
+- Public surface: fire, handle
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions, FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter for running Hono in Service Worker context
+- Copy-safe detail: const fire registers handler with addEventListener 'fetch', handle returns Handler function, uses provided fetch or binds to globalThis.fetch, returns response from app.fetch or falls back to fetch
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, Handler, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types (FetchEvent)
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker request handler wrapping Hono app
+- Copy-safe detail: type Handler = (evt: FetchEvent), HandleOptions with fetch option, handle takes Hono app and returns Handler, returns response with app.fetch or fallback fetch
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+
+- Public surface: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent
+- Internal names noticed: clientId, handled, preloadResponse, resultingClientId, waitUntil
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent interface definition
+- Copy-safe detail: interface ExtendableEvent has waitUntil, interface FetchEvent extends ExtendableEvent with clientId handled preloadResponse request resultingClientId and respondWith method
+
+## Path Inventory
+
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
